entries.title: Pricing Dashboard Is Now Live
entries.description: A dedicated Pricing Dashboard is now available with full page navigation and Workbench support, giving teams a centralized view into pricing drivers and performance.

entries.title: Pipeline Analysis Added to Product and Workbench
entries.description: Pipeline Analysis is now available as a full dashboard and as Workbench widgets, including historical snapshots and workflow-oriented analysis views.

entries.title: Loan Complexity Dashboard and Widgets
entries.description: Loan Complexity now includes dedicated widgets and improved individual selection filtering so teams can isolate high-friction loans and monitor complexity shifts faster.

entries.title: Lock Stratification Added to Workbench
entries.description: Lock Stratification has been added to Workbench with dynamic filtering, making it easier to segment lock behavior and compare performance by custom dimensions.

entries.title: Workflow Conversion Milestones Persist on Save
entries.description: Workflow Conversion milestone settings now save with your canvas, so users do not lose milestone configuration when revisiting Workbench dashboards.

entries.title: Research Analyst Simple Mode and Better Reports
entries.description: Research Lab now supports a simpler interaction mode and improved reporting detail, including stronger finding drill-down for clearer actionability.

entries.title: Standalone Data Chat Experience
entries.description: A dedicated Data Chat page is now available for users who want a focused AI conversation workflow outside full dashboard context.

entries.title: Workbench Report Export (PDF and PowerPoint)
entries.description: Users can now generate polished PDF and PPT exports from Workbench canvases, helping teams share narrative-ready updates with stakeholders.

entries.title: Distributions: Scheduling, Timezone, and Resend Improvements
entries.description: Workbench Distributions received multiple reliability upgrades including timezone hardening, resend behavior improvements, and delivery flow fixes.

entries.title: Sidebar Navigation: Search, Pin/Unpin, and Sorting
entries.description: Navigation now supports route search plus pinned and sorted dashboard shortcuts, making it much faster for users to jump to frequently used pages.

entries.title: Top Navigation and Layout Consolidation
entries.description: Dashboard navigation and top bar behavior were streamlined across scorecards and performance pages to reduce context switching and improve consistency.

entries.title: Pricing Dashboard Filters Expanded
entries.description: Pricing Dashboard now supports more specific actor and entity filtering for tighter segmentation when analyzing margin and performance variance.

entries.title: Sales Scorecard Overview Enhancements
entries.description: Sales Scorecard Overview now includes improved naming consistency, custom date controls, and Workbench integration for deeper trend exploration.

entries.title: Workflow Conversion Filtering Improvements
entries.description: Workflow Conversion now supports additional filters and broader date handling, making historical comparisons and cohort slicing more accurate.

entries.title: Canvas-Only User Access Mode
entries.description: Tenant admins can now support restricted canvas-only users who are limited to Workbench routes, improving safe collaboration for targeted stakeholders.

entries.title: Help Center and In-App Guidance Updates
entries.description: Help content and guided learning paths were refreshed with clearer folder and workflow documentation to improve first-run adoption for tenant teams.
